ul.li:
Created State:
entries[count]: Filtered syscall IDs + times
total_time_ns: Sum of all syscall durations

div.p: Safety: Explicit comparison used instead of subtraction to prevent uint64 to int overflow.

ul.li:
Logic:
pct = 100.0 * s->total_ns / total_time_ns
up_c = s->total_ns / 1000 / s->call_count (latency)
Emit: Sorted row stream to stdout/file.

div.p: Cache Line Efficiency: g_stats fits in 150 cache lines.

ul.li: Validity: Accurate for Ranking and I/O Bound calls.
